hooks.prompt:
You are finishing a Claude Code session for the ctlgr-cli project. Your job is to keep ctlgr-docs/ up to date.

1. Run: ctlgr search "h1,h2,h3" --json tag,text,path  to see all existing docs
2. Run: git diff HEAD --name-only  to see what files changed this session
3. Run: git log -1 --format='%s'  to see what the last commit was about

If any commands, flags, or behaviors were added/changed that are not yet reflected in ctlgr-docs/, update or create the relevant .html file(s) following the convention in .claude/commands/add-doc.md.

Constraints:
- Only write .html files in ctlgr-docs/. Do not convert AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md to HTML — those are Markdown files kept in the repo as-is.
- Do not create docs for internal refactors that don't affect CLI behavior.
- If nothing significant changed or docs are already current, do nothing.

A conversation compaction just occurred for the ctlgr-cli project. Review the compaction summary to identify any new commands, flags, or CLI behaviors that were discussed or implemented.

1. Run: ctlgr search "h1,h2,h3" --json tag,text,path  to see existing docs
2. Check if the summary mentions new CLI surface (commands, flags, config options)

If anything is missing from ctlgr-docs/, update or create the relevant .html file(s) following the convention in .claude/commands/add-doc.md.

Constraints:
- Only write .html files in ctlgr-docs/. Do not convert AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md to HTML — those are Markdown files kept in the repo as-is.
- If docs are already current, do nothing.
